_meta.label: NEEDS REVIEW - Catalog RFQ with a close-tie match and a margin-floor policy breach
_meta.test_focus: close-tie flag on line 1 + policy breach on line 1 both independently route to needs_review

inbound_message.subject: Urgent RFQ - Structural Fixings Project GC-2025-088
inbound_message.body:
Hi,

Could you quote urgently on the below for a structural fixings job?

- 2000x M12 Stainless Hex Bolt (Grade A2)
- 2000x M12 Stainless Hex Nut A2

Delivery needed by 5 July 2025 to our Birmingham site. Please advise if Grade A4 is available at similar cost.

Thanks,
Rachel Obi
Procurement - Greenfield Construction Ltd

line_items.raw_text: M12 Stainless Hex Bolt Grade A2

M12 Stainless Hex Bolt Grade A2

routing_reasons: policy: margin_floor_breach on SKU-201 at qty 2000
